description: Fix critical bug: pawns don't move after rolling 4 or 8. The rollDice() guard checks _isAnimating which is still true when onRoll fires, silently blocking the roll.
steps: In game_provider.dart, remove || _isAnimating from the rollDice() method guard (keep it in selectPawn())
In dice_widget.dart, call widget.onAnimationEnd before widget.onRoll in _onRollAnimationStatus for correctness
Update CURRENT_STATUS.md to note the critical bug fix
acceptance_criteria: rollDice() no longer checks _isAnimating and will execute the roll when called from animation completion
onAnimationEnd is called before onRoll in _onRollAnimationStatus so isAnimating is cleared first
selectPawn() still checks _isAnimating to prevent pawn selection during animation
All existing tests continue to pass
